emails.body: Re: Westlaw Luncheon Thursday, 7/27 at EB 47C2 12 1:30 PM Is this only available to the Legal Group? There are a few people in Credit and Global Contracts that might find this helpful. Please add me to the list. Thanks! Sylvia Hu@ENRON 07/13/2000 05:51 PM

emails.body: Tana: Please feel free to extend the invitation to any Enron employees who may be interested in the presentation. 1st come, 1st serve. Thanks, Sylvia Forwarded by Sylvia Hu/Corp/Enron on 07/14/2000 03:17 PM Tana Jones@ECT 07/13/2000 07:39 PM
